RULING:
MATTER WAS NOT. A R G U E D. The Court adopted its Tentative Ruling:
PLAINTIFF LEE COLE'S Notice Of Motion To Amend Complaint IS GRANTED PROVIDED THAT PLAINTIFF OBTAINS A CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE.
